FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: PBOC sets USD/CNY above estimate, signaling USD strength
Oil supply fears sustain elevated Brent, supporting USD via risk-off flows
EU-US tariff truce reduces trade war risk, bolstering risk appetite
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised higher as PBOC weakens CNY, oil supply fears sustain USD strength.
FX.comment: PBOC weakens CNY and oil supply fears sustain USD strength against JPY
